wiki.summary: "BEAT UP CHANEL$" is a song by American singer-songwriter Slayyyter, released as the lead single from her third studio album, "WOR$T GIRL IN AMERICA", on August 1, 2025, through RECORDS CO, a subsidiary of Columbia Records. Slayyyter teased the track on July 10, 2025, via a snippet shared on X, generating significant fan excitement. The single’s cover art was revealed on July 28, 2025, and the song’s release coincided with a music video premiere at midnight ET on August 1, 2025, as announced on X. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "BEAT UP CHANEL$" is a song by American singer-songwriter Slayyyter, released as the lead single from her third studio album, "WOR$T GIRL IN AMERICA", on August 1, 2025, through RECORDS CO, a subsidiary of Columbia Records. Slayyyter teased the track on July 10, 2025, via a snippet shared on X, generating significant fan excitement. The single’s cover art was revealed on July 28, 2025, and the song’s release coincided with a music video premiere at midnight ET on August 1, 2025, as announced on X. Written by Austin Dale Corona, Slayyyter, and Wyatt Bernard, and produced by Wyatt Bernard and Austin Corona, the high-energy pop track features Slayyyter’s signature hyperpop and mainstream pop blend. The song’s themes likely explore luxury, rebellion, and self-empowerment, with its title suggesting a satirical take on high fashion and consumerism. Read more on Last.fm.
